name: Stash
description: Open-source self-hosted memory layer for AI agents. Gives any agent persistent, semantic memory across sessions — model-agnostic, deployable on your own infrastructure.

skills.name: Persist Memory
skills.description: Store agent memories across sessions with automatic expiration controls and priority scoring

skills.name: Semantic Recall
skills.description: Retrieve relevant past memories by semantic similarity rather than exact keyword matching alone

skills.name: Self-Hosted Deploy
skills.description: Deploy on your own infrastructure for full data ownership with no external memory service dependency
